title: Tower of Hanoi
hints: Use recursion to solve the problem.
To move A disks from source to destination using auxiliary:
1. Move top A-1 disks from source to auxiliary (using destination as auxiliary)
2. Move the largest disk A from source to destination
3. Move the A-1 disks from auxiliary to destination (using source as auxiliary)
Base case: if A == 1, move disk 1 from source to destination.
